title: Sorcerer's Awakening
description: Sorcerer's Awakening — A Jujutsu Kaisen inspired Minecraft data pack, actively in development!
body:
**Sorcerer's Awakening**

*A Jujutsu Kaisen inspired Minecraft 1.21.11 data pack, actively in development.*

---

In Sorcerer's Awakening, you are thrown into a world plagued by Cursed Spirits. You begin as a normal person with no special abilities — but through exploration, quests, and hard work, you can awaken as a Sorcerer or a Cursed Spirit, each with their own unique playstyle and abilities.

As a **Sorcerer**, you must manage your Cursed Energy wisely, rank up through the Jujutsu grades, and master powerful Cursed Techniques inspired by characters from the series. As a **Cursed Spirit**, you are naturally powerful, growing stronger with every player you defeat.

The world is full of NPCs, quests, and secrets waiting to be discovered. Your path to power is earned, not given.

**Will you protect the world, or consume it?**

---
